desires: Maintain the bond with Mina and the cohort by staying on this call, even if it means ignoring my exhaustion.
Avoid the immediate pressure of studying for tomorrow's midterm by distracting myself with social connection.
Protect my current energy levels by refusing to set boundaries or leave the conversation right now.

goals.description: Stay glued to Mina and Jae on this call; the exam is a boring abstract concept compared to the real, breathing people right in front of me.
goals.rationale: Affiliation (0.5) is my core driver. Missing this moment with cohort_3 feels like betrayal. The impulsive nature means I can't wait for 'tomorrow' to feel the connection.

goals.description: Keep complaining about the unfairness of the exam schedule and the professor's choices to keep the group energy high and united against the 'system'.
goals.rationale: Assertiveness (8/10) demands I vocalize my frustration directly. Bonding over shared anger validates my choice to skip studying and reinforces my loyalty to the crew.

goals.description: Ignore any urge to open a textbook or think about the midterm; if someone brings it up, change the subject immediately.
goals.rationale: Short planning horizon and high procrastination bias (7/10). Future consequences don't hurt yet, but social disconnection hurts now. Protecting current emotional energy is non-negotiable.

agent.last_reasoning: Prioritizes relationships (0.5) by maintaining connection despite absence. Assertively communicates my boundary (impulsive choice to sleep now). Avoids future stress of studying while validating the group's shared frustration.

goals.description: Immediately leave for Echo to meet Mina and Jae; I'm done with this studying, it's isolating and I need my people right now.
goals.rationale: My value system prioritizes relationships (0.5) over academic outcomes (0.15). The 'impulsive' axis drives me to seek immediate dopamine and connection rather than delaying gratification for a future exam. Being alone feels pointless compared to the support of my cohort.

goals.description: Tell the professor or anyone asking that I'm skipping study time tonight because I'm with my friends.
goals.rationale: I am assertive (8/10) and set boundaries directly. If anyone questions my choice, I will own it without apologizing, reinforcing that my social bonds are non-negotiable.

goals.description: Forget about laundry and tomorrow's review until after I've had fun tonight.
goals.rationale: Short planning horizon and high procrastination bias mean I discount the consequences of tomorrow's potential stress in favor of tonight's relief. Laundry is a low-stakes task that can wait indefinitely.
